name: Hugo Development
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; HUGO_VERSION=0.134.3; apt-get update; apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates tar; ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture); case "$ARCH" in amd64) HUGO_ARCH=amd64 ;; arm64) HUGO_ARCH=arm64 ;; *) echo "Unsupported architecture: $ARCH" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; curl -fsSL "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/download/v${HUGO_VERSION}/hugo_extended_${HUGO_VERSION}_linux-${HUGO_ARCH}.tar.gz" | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin hugo; git submodule update --init --recursive; hugo version'
